concerns.detail: Deletion of 46 paragraphs removes substantive, specific allegations about advisors USC Yue Wang and UCB Haoran Geng regarding recommendation practices (writing strong recs for non-interns with personal connections, promising letters from Pieter Abbeel/Jitendra Malik but allegedly using personal Gmail), intern funding, and management issues. This appears to suppress legitimate observations rather than perform cleanup (typos, blanks, or off-topic lines).
concerns.excerpt: USC Yue Wang 别删了，再删你是Chaowei Xiao... 今年给一个没在组里当过intern（也没co-author发过paper）的学生写了最强推... UCB Haoran Geng别删了... 给每个intern承诺可以拿Pieter Abbeel和Jitendra Malik的推荐信，但事实上不行
